name: USS PC-819 (PC-819)
events: 6 Feb 1944 During 6/7 February 1944, USS Tilefish (T/Lt.Cdr. R.M. Keithly, USN) conducted exercises off San Diego with USS Kennison (T/Lt.Cdr. R.E. Babb, USN) and USS PC-819 (Lt. E.D. Mendenhall, Jr., USNR).

8 Feb 1944 During 8/9 February 1944, USS Tilefish (T/Lt.Cdr. R.M. Keithly, USN) conducted exercises off San Diego with USS Kennison (T/Lt.Cdr. R.E. Babb, USN) and USS PC-819 (Lt. E.D. Mendenhall, Jr., USNR).

10 Feb 1944 During 10/11 February 1944, USS Tilefish (T/Lt.Cdr. R.M. Keithly, USN) conducted exercises off San Diego with USS Kennison (T/Lt.Cdr. R.E. Babb, USN) and USS PC-819 (Lt. E.D. Mendenhall, Jr., USNR).
USS PC-819 participated only on the 10th though.

13 Feb 1944 During 13/14 February 1944, USS Tilefish (T/Lt.Cdr. R.M. Keithly, USN) conducted exercises off San Diego with USS Crane (Lt.Cdr. S.L. Halfon, USNR) and USS PC-819 (Lt. E.D. Mendenhall, Jr., USNR).
USS PC-819 participated only on the 14th though.

15 Feb 1944 During 15/16 February 1944, USS Tilefish (T/Lt.Cdr. R.M. Keithly, USN) conducted exercises off San Diego with USS Crane (Lt.Cdr. S.L. Halfon, USNR) and USS PC-819 (Lt. E.D. Mendenhall, Jr., USNR).
